caption: A security camera view shows a dark, outdoor area with a grainy, monochromatic image. In the background, a white ladder leans against a wall or structure. A person wearing a light-colored garment is partially visible on the left edge of the frame. As the sequence progresses, the camera angle shifts slightly, and the light-colored figure moves toward the center, eventually appearing as a small, pale shape near the ladder. The ground is uneven and textured. A red and white overlay at the bottom left of each view contains the text "Cam 04" followed by a small red icon and a white mute symbol. The overall scene is dimly lit, capturing subtle movements in a quiet, industrial or backyard setting.
